name: TA547
brief: Proofpoint identified TA547 targeting German organizations with an email campaign delivering Rhadamanthys malware. This is the first time researchers observed TA547 use Rhadamanthys, an information stealer that is used by multiple cybercriminal threat actors. Additionally, the actor appeared to use a PowerShell script that researchers suspect was generated by large language model (LLM) such as ChatGPT, Gemini, CoPilot, etc. Source
ttpMd: **LLM-enhanced scripting techniques:** Execution through Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) or PowerShell (T1059)
